P.Span: When SAS and SO99 don't train on same historical values.
This case has no impact on WAPE (there is one on MAE), because ration cannot be calculated on missing ActualRaw. Nevertheless, Time series in this case should be removed from benchmark.
This case has an impact on WAPE, and it can be huge. Time series in this case should be removed from benchmark absolutely.

This case shows SO99 and SAS don't have the same historical data. Even if there is no impact on FA, there is one on global quantities and MAE. Time series in this case should be removed from benchmark.

This case shows SO99 and SAS don't have the same historical data. This case has an impact on FA, and also on global quantities and MAE. Time series in this case should be removed from benchmark absolutely.

VisualContainer.name: ve399
VisualContainer.label: ▶️ Flag All Null - All Missing 1a - All Missing 1b
